execution_boundary.summary: in-toto verifies supply-chain steps and metadata but does not execute runtime transitions.

preparation_boundary.summary: Verified build artifacts may inform preparation review but do not authorize use.

commitment_boundary.summary: Supply-chain verification can contribute artifact standing evidence at commitment time.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Layout steps and functionary identities require stable mapping into StegVerse semantics.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: in-toto does not directly classify unknown runtime action trajectories.

authority_boundary.summary: Layout conformance does not create runtime execution authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Layout, link metadata, keys, signatures, and artifact references must remain current and valid.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Signed link metadata and layouts can materially strengthen supply-chain reconstruction.

interoperability_path.summary: in-toto evidence enters as artifact origin, functionary, and process provenance evidence.

next_required_action: add layout-conformant and missing-step fixture cases
